concept: Please design a platformer where the player's character leaves behind an echo that precisely replicates their previous attempt's movements when they restart a level. These echoes become solid platforms in subsequent attempts, allowing the player to literally stand on their past performances to reach new areas. Each level has a limited number of echoes allowed before older ones start disappearing, requiring careful planning of which past runs to preserve. Certain obstacles can only be overcome through precise coordination between the player and their strategically created echoes. The narrative involves a time-trapped explorer seeking to break out of a recursive dimension by finding perfect harmonization with their own timeline variants.
